\label{tab:ablation_summary}

\midrule

Median per-dataset $\Delta$ARI (ON $-$ OFF) & +0.000 \\
Datasets where merge \emph{helps}   & 11/30 \\
Datasets where merge \emph{hurts}   & 3/30 \\
Datasets unchanged                    & 16/30 \\
Wilcoxon signed-rank $p$-value        & $0.0555$ \\
\bottomrule
